headline: Local Business Partners Start New Chapter of Business Ownership with Opening of New PostalAnnex Location in National City, California
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., one of the leading franchisors in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is proud to announce the opening of its newest PostalAnnex location in National City, CA to new owners, Vanesa Gonzalez and Pedro Olvera. This new PostalAnnex is set to offer a wide range of essential shipping, mailbox rental and office services to the local community.

headline: FedEx to return full MD-11 capacity ahead of peak season
summary: After grounding its entire MD-11 fleet in November, the carrier began reintroducing the aircraft in May, CEO Raj Subramaniam said.
